message:
fix(web): include shift modifier in HelpOverlay layer detection

Bug: getDepthLayer() was checking for alt/ctrl/meta modifiers but
missed shift, causing Shift+key shortcuts (like Shift+K for AA Key,
Shift+L for AA Legend, Shift+V for Packaging Pressure) to be
incorrectly classified as Layer 1 instead of Layer 2.

Before: hasModifiers = c.modifiers.alt || c.modifiers.ctrl || c.modifiers.meta
After:  hasModifiers = c.modifiers.alt || c.modifiers.ctrl || c.modifiers.meta || c.modifiers.shift

This ensures shortcuts requiring the Shift modifier are properly
grouped with other modifier-based shortcuts in Layer 2 (Analysis Menu).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
